evidence: src/components/StatusPill.tsx and src/components/Badge.tsx render the same semantic status concept with divergent colour maps
Badge.tsx maps 'at-risk' to a non-token orange while StatusPill.tsx uses status.warning
governance/interaction-graph/nodes/recipe-status-pill.json defines a single canonical status-pill recipe
violates governance/design-genome/enterprise-pm-genome.json#component_conventions.rules ('prefer one canonical component per role; duplicates are debt')
remediation: Consolidate Badge.tsx into the canonical StatusPill driven by recipe-status-pill, mapping all status values to semantic tokens with text labels. Codemod existing Badge usages, then delete Badge.tsx and add a registry rule pointing status rendering at the single recipe.
